TestCase z13Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_k = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_k, t1.k, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.k = follow_case_k;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: sort array descending
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.n; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.k[i] < follow_case.k[j]) {
                double temp = follow_case.k[i];
                follow_case.k[i] = follow_case.k[j];
                follow_case.k[j] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
